use_cases: Displaying responsive headings with predefined font sizes ranging from 16px to 72px
Applying consistent button text styling across different sizes
Implementing responsive text behavior with SM/MD/LG/XL breakpoints
Creating typography systems with tight letter-spacing for modern aesthetics
Building text components that adapt to different screen sizes automatically
ai_summary: A typography component providing predefined text variants for headings (16-72px) and buttons with semantic naming conventions. Features a custom responsive hook that adjusts styling based on viewport breakpoints. Uses tight letter-spacing for headings creating a modern, editorial look. Designed as a foundational atomic component for design systems requiring consistent text treatment.
